settings.selectTabPrompt: Please select a tab above to view global settings
settings.subtitle: Configure themes, networking, hotkeys, monitor profiles, overlay publishing, locale handling, and global debug tools
settings.locales.subtitle: Control translation sources, language display, and runtime locale maintenance tools.
settings.profile.subtitle: Create and manage skill monitor profiles, and configure event logger behavior and session log storage.
settings.overlay.subtitle: Control which monitor systems actively publish data to the shared overlay.
settings.overlay.startWithAppDescription: Open the shared overlay automatically when the app starts and overlay publishing is enabled.
